+@name: Classroom of the Elite 4th Season: Second Year, First Semester

info.+content: Classroom of the Elite 4th Season: Second Year, First Semester
Yōkoso Jitsuryoku Shijō Shugi no Kyōshitsu e 4th Season 2-nen Sei Hen 1 Gakki
ようこそ実力至上主義の教室へ 4th Season 2年生編1学期

Metropolitan Advanced Nurturing High School promises a perfect future, but only the strongest can claim it. After a crushing defeat sends Ayanokoji’s class back to Class D, they start their second year at the bottom yet again. As bonds deepen and loyalties shift, a new exam pairs them with incoming students—one of whom is a White Room assassin.
"Liar Veil" (ライアーヴェール) by ZAQ
